---
title: "IFCD044 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd044, backlog]
---


<style>
tr:nth-child(0) {
  background-color: #b2b2b2!important;
  color: #f4f4f4!important;
}
</style>


![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

## ``Sprint#3: Approaches Multi-Agent App II`` (July 2026)

::: {.column-page-right}
| Sprint | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| #3 | 09 |  13/07/2026 |  - Plan Spring#3: SCRUM concepts, project, tests, books</br></br> - Approaches Multi-Agent App II: planning spring. Jira backlog </br> <s> - Week 3: Delivering Value & Communication  </br> - Week 4: ScrumMaster, how it works </br> - Week 5: Mindset, the key to everything </s></br></br> - SCRUM: meetings as a cognitive cycle   </br> - **Meeting mindset:**</br> (1) match goal vs meeting type  </br> (2) focus and hemisphere </br> (3) Emotional engagement </br> (4) Thinking engagement </br></br> - Rider and the Elephant: **moral emotions**   | - [Week#03](/scrum/scrum-week3.qmd){.external target='_blank' } / [Week#04](/scrum/scrum-week4.qmd){.external target='_blank' } /  [Week#05](/scrum/scrum-week5.qmd){.external target='_blank' } </br></br>  [neutrality.org](https://x.com/neutralityorg){.external target='_blank'} /  [neutrality project](https://neutralityproject.org/){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd044-26/neutralloty.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br></br> - [Rider and the Elephant](https://albertprofe.dev/scrum/scrum-week12.html#haidts-the-rider-and-the-elephant){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [The Righteous Mind](https://albertprofe.dev/books/theRighteousMind.html#more-info){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [The Righteous Mind web](https://righteousmind.com/){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd044-26/moral-emotions.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [Wiki](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Righteous_Mind){.external target='_blank'} |
|  | 10 | 14/07/2026 |  - Week 4: **ScrumMaster**, how it works  </br> - We ek 6: Product Owner, how it works </br> - Week 8: Team & the Specialist </br></br> - ScrumMaster tools: on the same page </br> - Intention > Salience > Attention > Metacognition </br> - **TeamWork**: on the same page + decision making focused on client through different apporaches |   [Week#04](/scrum/scrum-week4.qmd){.external target='_blank' } / [Week#06](/scrum/scrum-week6.qmd){.external target='_blank' } /   [Week#08](/scrum/scrum-week8.qmd){.external target='_blank' } </br></br>  ![](https://albertprofe.dev/images/scrum/scrum-master-responsible-for-process-success.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> ![](https://albertprofe.dev/images/scrum/team-canvas.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [Metacognition](/scrum/scrum-articles-metacognition.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [The zone](https://www.sportpsychologytoday.com/sport-psychology-for-athletes/how-to-get-in-the-zone-mindfulness/){.external target='_blank'} |
|  | 11 | 15/07/2026 | - Week 5: Mindset, the key to everything </br> (1) mindset types: growth & fixed   </br>  (2) examples </br>  (3) survival mindset </br>  (4) purpose | - [Week#05](/scrum/scrum-week5.qmd){.external target='_blank' } </br> </br>   ![](https://albertprofe.dev/images/scrum/fixed_growth.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  ![](https://albertprofe.dev/images/scrum/skin.jpg){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}   |
|  | 12 | 16/07/2026 | - Week 5: Mindset, the key to everything   </br> (1) the soviet union delusion </br>  (2) the divided brain </br>  (3) skin in the game and antifragile  </br>  |     |
|  | 13 | 17/07/2026 | - Approaches Multi-Agent App: Revision and Retrospective </br></br> - Books  |     |
: Sprint #3  Backlog course July 2026 table {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,60,34]"}
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Legend"}
- `-` > topic planned and **done**
- `- ` <s>done</s> > topic not done in class (**pending**)
- `++` > not-planned new topic
:::
